---
title: "Justin Donaldson"
description: "Writing on machine learning, model interpretability, and data visualization — by Justin Donaldson, Ph.D."
image: images/me.jpeg
listing:
  contents:
    - "posts/*.qmd"
    - "posts/*.ipynb"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  feed: true
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
aliases:
  - blog.html
toc: false
---

::: {.column-margin}
[![The Three Sisters Mountains in Sisters, Oregon](images/sisters.jpeg)](about.qmd)
:::

> *Ogni parte ad ogni parte splende* — "each part to each part shines."

I'm **Justin Donaldson** — an HCI / ML scientist and engineer. I write here about
machine learning, model interpretability, and turning complex things into
something you can see. Browse the posts below, explore the live
[visualizations](viz/index.qmd) — including [STARLINGS](viz/boids.html), a 3D
murmuration in WebAssembly — or read more [about me](about.qmd) and my [CV](cv.qmd).
